# Let's open the provided file and display its raw content with visible indices and maybe repr
path = '/mnt/data/file-5w1hq9vjusPQ7GFbzAC24n-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw = f.read()
raw, len(raw)

raw = raw  # from previous cell
# Find all occurrences of curly braces contents
braces = []
idx = 0
while True:
    start = raw.find('{', idx)
    if start == -1:
        break
    end = raw.find('}', start+1)
    if end == -1:
        break
    content = raw[start+1:end]
    braces.append((start, end, content))
    idx = end + 1

len(braces), braces[0][2][:50], braces[0][2][-50:]

# Find all double quote characters indices
quote_indices = [i for i, ch in enumerate(raw) if ch == '"']
len(quote_indices), quote_indices[:10], quote_indices[-10:]

def context(i, radius=60):
    s = max(0, i - radius)
    e = min(len(raw), i + radius)
    return raw[s:e], s

for idx in quote_indices:
    ctx, s = context(idx, radius=80)
    print(idx, repr(ctx))
    print()

quote_pairs = [(quote_indices[i], quote_indices[i+1]) for i in range(0, len(quote_indices)-1, 2)]
quote_pairs

hadith_contents = []
for start, end in quote_pairs:
    content = raw[start+1:end]
    # Check for spaces at edges
    hadith_contents.append((start, end, content, repr(content[:3]), repr(content[-3:])))
hadith_contents

last_open = quote_indices[-1]
last_content = raw[last_open+1:]
last_content, last_open+1, len(raw)

spans = [
    (156, 284, 'Aya'),
    (297, 575, 'Aya'),
    (667, 864, 'Hadeeth'),
    (968, 1038, 'Hadeeth'),
    (1114, 1280, 'Hadeeth'),
    (1382, 1452, 'Hadeeth'),
    (1520, 1590, 'Hadeeth'),
    (1654, 1724, 'Hadeeth'),
    (1792, 1812, 'Hadeeth')
]
# Validate substrings and check boundaries
def is_clean_boundary(start, end):
    # no leading/trailing whitespace or quotes or braces
    lead = raw[start-1] if start > 0 else ''
    trail = raw[end] if end < len(raw) else ''
    leftok = lead in ['"', '{', ' ', '\n', '،', ':'] or start==0
    rightok = trail in ['"', '}', ' ', '\n', '.', '،', ':'] or end == len(raw)
    return leftok, lead, rightok, trail

results = []
for (s,e,t) in spans:
    text = raw[s:e]
    leftok, lead, rightok, trail = is_clean_boundary(s,e)
    results.append({
        'span_start': s, 'span_end': e, 'citation_type': t, 'span_text': text,
        'lead_char': lead, 'trail_char': trail, 'leftok': leftok, 'rightok': rightok,
        'starts_with_space': text.startswith(' '), 'ends_with_space': text.endswith(' ')
    })
results

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":156,"span_end":284,"span_text":"قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ لِمَ تَعْجَبُونَ مِنْ أَنْ يَأْتِيَكُمْ رِجَالٌ يَنْصُرُونَ مِنْ عِنْدِ اللَّهِ وَبَشِّرُوهُمْ بِقَدَرٍ عَظِيمٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":297,"span_end":575,"span_text":"وَقَالَ يَا قَوْمِ إِنَّ هَذَا إِلًا مِنَ رَسُولٍ إِنَّهُ يَأْتِيَكُمْ بِآيَةٍ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ وَاللَّهُ يَرْزُقُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ وَمَا أَنْعَمْتُمْ فَأَنْعَمْ لِأُولِيَ الْأَلْوَانِ مِنَ النَّاسِ وَزِدْ لَهُمْ فَضْلًا وَلا تَمُدَّ وَصْفًا لِنَفْسِكَ فَيَصْبَحَ مِنَ الْمُخْتَالِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":667,"span_end":864,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ أَخَذَ مِنَ النُجومِ وَإِنَّما نَزَلَتِ النُجومُ عَلَيْهِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَخَذَ مِنَ النُجومِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":968,"span_end":1038,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1114,"span_end":1280,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأُذِنَ لَهُ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأُذِنَ لَهُ بِالنُجومِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1382,"span_end":1452,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1520,"span_end":1590,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1654,"span_end":1724,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُجومِ أَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ وَأَرُبَّعَةَ أَزْوَاجٍ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1792,"span_end":1812,"span_text":"أُذِنَ لِنوحٍ بِالنُ","citation_type":"Hadeeth"}]}
